signals.headline: US and Iran Plan Fresh Talks Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires Next Week | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
US and Iran Plan Fresh Talks Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires Next Week | NO | MED confidence**

No ceasefire extension, deal, or resolution has been confirmed; weekend talks in Islamabad ended without agreement, but both sides are discussing new negotiations this week to avert expiration.[1] President Trump is linked to the initial two-week ceasefire window from April 7 for talks, consistent with
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
Trump announces US x Iran ceasefire end by April 21, 2026?
US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 22, 2026?

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in January and February but below market forecasts of 2.4%; this fresh data release could shift prediction markets on BoK rate holds amid Middle East energy shocks.[1]
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: No Breaking GDP Announcements for Germany or South Korea | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
No Breaking GDP Announcements for Germany or South Korea | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Germany's OECD-projected GDP growth remains at 0.3% for 2025 and 1% for 2026 with no new confirmations; South Korea lacks recent GDP data releases amid rising debt-to-GDP concerns.[2][6]
